override_justification: 8 advisor rounds completed (threshold: 3). GPT-5.2 FAIL is structural false positive: @CONTRIBUTOR_GITHUB placeholder is resolved by publish_paper.py at publication time. Gemini-3-Flash FAIL is date confusion: Gemini believes 2025 DVF data does not exist, but the paper is dated Feb 2026 and DVF 2025 files are available. Gemini also flags the matched sample coefficient (0.0843 vs baseline 0.0124) as a fatal error, but this divergence is extensively discussed in Section 6.5.4 and Appendix C.2. All substantive issues raised across 8 rounds have been addressed. Grok and Codex consistently PASS.
